name: Beer Batter Softshell Crabs
recipeInstructions:
1. Pour beer into a mixing bowl.
2. Add flour, then the remaining ingredients (salt, paprika, and baking powder).
3. Mix well until smooth.
4. Allow batter to rest for at least 1-1/2 hours before use, as it will thicken while standing.
5. Dust crabs lightly with flour.
6. Dip each crab individually into the batter.
7. Deep-fry at 360 degrees Fahrenheit for 2-5 minutes, depending on size.
8. Crabs should be golden brown when done.
9. Drain excess oil and serve.
